title: Database
doc_html:
§3206. Database

            The department shall create and maintain a database of certified veteran-owned businesses. The department shall make the database available for public access on its official webpage.

            Acts 2019, No. 160, §1.
doc_text:
§3206.  Database
The department shall create and maintain a database of certified veteran-owned
businesses.  The department shall make the database available for public access on its official
webpage.
Acts 2019, No. 160, §1.
